guidances.note: Management guided similar growth to FY26's 87% (i.e. ~80-90% YoY) for FY27
Management reiterated 17-22% EBITDA margin range for current competencies, expects improvement over FY26's 13.7%
Space and semiconductor segments guided to grow 300-400% YoY in FY27
QIP planned, quantum ~7-10% of market cap, for capacity expansion/operational infrastructure/working capital; not yet completed as of Q4 FY26 call
Additional ~2,10,000 sqft leased facility near existing Bengaluru operations, to house space and semiconductor programs
Boeing T-7A program (~USD200mn strategic agreement) production ramp-up expected Q3 FY27 (later part of the year), continuing growth for 5-7 years per management
Company shortlisted as a potential India-supply-base supplier for a commercial aircraft OEM; RFPs expected by Q2 FY27
